title: bellis rotundifolia
intro: Bellis rotundifolia, also known as the daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bellis rotundifolia include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to treat a range of ailments, including skin conditions and respiratory issues.
